ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device (e.g., Puck, Pixl, Bangle) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the device manufacturer */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was released */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the device */,
  "battery_life" INTEGER /* Battery life of the device in hours */,
  "connectivity_options" TEXT /* JSON array of connectivity options (e.g., Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being evaluated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Suggestion provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was provided */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., usability, functionality, design) */,
  "like_dislike" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user liked or disliked the device */,
  "used_features" TEXT /* JSON array of features the user has used */,
  "device_version" TEXT /* Version of the device used when providing feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user reporting the issue */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device experiencing the issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the issue was reported */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., hardware, software, connectivity) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the issue */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the developer assigned to the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being analyzed */,
  "rating_average" REAL /* Average rating given by users */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments provided by users */,
  "suggestion_count" INTEGER /* Number of suggestions provided by users */,
  "feedback_count" INTEGER /* Total number of feedback entries */,
  "issue_count" INTEGER /* Total number of issues reported */,
  "user_count" INTEGER /* Total number of users who provided feedback */,
  "average_battery_life" REAL /* Average battery life of the device based on user feedback */,
  "top_issues" TEXT /* JSON array of the top issues reported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device with the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "feature_group" TEXT /* Group to which the feature belongs (e.g., connectivity, display) */,
  "feature_version" TEXT /* Version of the feature */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_features_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_device_interaction" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user interacting with the device */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being interacted with */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., connection, disconnection, command) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "device_version" TEXT /* Version of the device during the interaction */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "interaction_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the interaction (e.g., commands executed, errors encountered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_device_interaction_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_device_interaction_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device with the status */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the status update */,
  "device_version" TEXT /* Version of the device at the time of status update */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status change (e.g., battery low, user action) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_status_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device with the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., software, firmware) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the update */,
  "update_version" TEXT /* Version of the update */,
  "installation_status" TEXT /* Status of the update installation (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "installation_details" TEXT /* JSON object containing details of the update installation (e.g., error messages, logs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_updates_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
